allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['api.py','database.py','auth_utils.py']] and print\('Sintaxe OK'\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -X utf8 -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['api.py','database.py','auth_utils.py','config.py']]; print\('Sintaxe OK'\)")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -X utf8 -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['api.py','auth_utils.py','database.py']]; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); import api; print\('IMPORT OK,', sum\(1 for _ in api.app.routes\), 'rotas'\); [print\('-', r.methods if hasattr\(r,'methods'\) else '?', r.path\) for r in api.app.routes]")
